name: TC4 Node Stabilizer / Transducer / Node Jar Parity
parity_features: normal and advanced stabilizer strengths affect dangerous node stability and regeneration
powered node transducer energizes stabilized aura nodes
energized nodes receive visual boost and controlled primal vis regeneration
Node in a Jar stores node type, modifier, aspects, base aspects, stability and scanned state in NBT
jarring applies TC4-like preservation loss unless an advanced stabilizer is present
Thaumometer displays energized/stability state in node scan text
known_remaining: exact TC4 OBJ renderer for stabilizer/transducer is still approximated by cube models
full energized node relay network and vis relay rendering still needs deeper TC4 parity
exact TC4 node jarring multiblock glass ritual is represented as item interaction for now
